name: Multiple people at fault for my work slip in Saint George?
description: Comp for boss, sue third parties.[1]

mainEntity.name: Multiple people at fault for my work slip in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for boss, sue third parties.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp covers employer portion; sue others separately.** Subcontractors/property owners liable via negligence.[1] Coordinate claims carefully. Lawyer apportions fault, maximizes total recovery.
